ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disease_incidence" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded incidence rates */,
  "cold_incidence" REAL /* Rate of cold incidences on the given date */,
  "flu_incidence" REAL /* Rate of flu incidences on the given date */,
  "pneumonia_incidence" REAL /* Rate of pneumonia incidences on the given date */,
  "coronavirus_incidence" REAL /* Rate of coronavirus incidences on the given date */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_incidence_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES health_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_incidence_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city or town) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the facility is based */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of health facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the main contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility (number of patients it can handle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_facilities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the doctor works */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization_area" TEXT /* Specific area of specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES health_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor treating the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms presented by the patient */,
  "patient_address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "patient_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "patient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "patient_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is vaccinated against any of the illnesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment provided */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., successful, ongoing) */,
  "treatment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  "treatment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment in days */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "illnesses" (
  "illness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each illness */,
  "illness_name" TEXT /* Name of the illness */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "caused_by" TEXT /* Pathogen or cause of the illness */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission */,
  "prevention_methods" TEXT /* Methods to prevent the illness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("illness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, clinician) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Detailed content or summary of the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
